reviews.review_msg: Dr. Uszkalo is really enthusiastic about the material, although she does seem to focus more on history than the actual texts. She is quite condescending to students and has a tendency to make snide comments regarding a student's grade when handing back assignments or during a student's presentation. Extremely hard marker. Wouldn't recommend.

Worst English prof yet. She marks fairly hard, but also forces students to do a ridiculously large amount of work, for nothing. I have never had a class where every single student hates the prof. But this is it. Avoid like the black plague.

One of the worst teachers I've had. Not only is any opinion but hers irrelevant, she makes you work ridiculously hard for a pathetic grade. She teaches nothing about english itself and only about history. If you have a tight schedule, like me, it's impossible to get a decent grade because you have to attend extra classes in order to get it.

She is excellent! From an English major perspective, she's great. She's really willing to work with students, and to assist in making them better writers, even if some people think she's too tough. I find her amusing and engaging. Not an easy A, but a worthwhile course!

Kirsten, or Dr.Uszkalo (as she specifically demands to be referred to), is a very controversial prof.  If you're a strong feminist woman, there is no doubt you will be a fave in her class.  She knows her stuff (as do all profs).  Just beware of how subjective and single tracked her mind is: no challenge is welcomed.

Lovely woman, great teacher. I found her to be extremely witty, very engaging and was really approachable before, between and after classes. Lots of fun, makes lecture a blast. Can't wait to take another class with Kirsten and I wish SFU would give her tenure.

terrible prof. rude and very cynical. plays favorites and likes to make jokes at student's expense. Blatantly angry and hostile towards men, she even said 'boys suck' and went to explain that there were probably at least 4 good guys in the class though(there were 20 or so guys in total). I didnt spend $500 to listen to her irrelevant tirades.

LOVED this class--lecture was amazing and always interesting--she's hilarious!  It was a LOT of work (partly because we had no final exam), but I learned so much--very helpful in prepping for higher level courses.  Can't wait to take another class with her!

If you are ready to work your hardest and show an interest, this professor will bend over backwards for you. She is knowledgeable and always there for her students, so long as they put their best foot forward. I am so thankful to have been taught by her! She will change the way you learn and live.

Her lectures were useless because of the nature of the class and the essay topics being so streamlined that you need to do hours of research in areas not irrelevant, but removed from the lectures. The work load was ridiculous, but she is a lovely lady.
